summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CA.OS PWA enhancement. Backend APIs 87.5% success rate (14/16 tests passed). Frontend core functionality working well. PWA assets exist but HTML integration incomplete.

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 400 Bad Request when creating employees
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks employee creation and task assignment functionality

ui_bugs.issue: Missing PWA manifest link and meta tags in HTML head
Shows 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'CA.OS - Staff Management'
Modal overlay intercepts clicks, preventing form submission

passed_tests: PWA manifest.json accessible and contains correct metadata
Tasks page navigation and task creation modal
Attendance page navigation and records display
Queries page split panel view working perfectly
Backend APIs: dashboard stats, attendance, leaves, clients, queries, notifications
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Fix employee creation endpoint (400 error). 2. Add manifest link to HTML head: <link rel='manifest' href='/manifest.json'>. 3. Add PWA meta tags to HTML head. 4. Update page title to 'CA.OS - Staff Management'. 5. Fix Add Employee button visibility. 6. Fix leave application modal overlay click interception.
